starter.audience: Trying AgentSkeptic locally, OSS use, and small CI validation
starter.valueUnlock: Free local single-run verification plus 1,000 licensed CI checks per month. Upgrade when you need baselines, drift detection, or acceptance workflows.

individual.audience: Solo engineers enforcing verification in CI
individual.valueUnlock: Stateful CI enforcement for one engineer, including baseline management, drift detection, and change acceptance over time. Includes the licensed npm CLI and metered overage after the included quota.

team.audience: Small teams sharing CI enforcement across pipelines
team.valueUnlock: Shared team enforcement state, higher included volume, and metered overage after the included quota.

business.audience: Multi-service teams and high-volume verification workflows
business.valueUnlock: Organization-wide enforcement governance, large included volume, and metered overage for bursts.

enterprise.overageDisplayLabel: Negotiated pricing, typically at or below $0.007 per verification
enterprise.audience: Procurement, custom limits, on-prem, locked-down environments, and formal SLAs
enterprise.valueUnlock: Sales-led onboarding with tailored contract terms, deployment requirements, security review, and SLA.
